TopicPermission.description: Custom permission list for the key. If there are no custom permissions, displays as null

Permission.description: Permission type. AccessKey has permissions for this Topic. ALL: Publish and subscribe permissions. PUB: Publish permission. SUB: Subscribe permission. DENY: No publish or subscribe permissions

AccessKey.description: AccessKey ID for the RocketMQ key

AclConfigJson.description: All ACL configuration information for the RocketMQ key

Actived.description: Enable status for the RocketMQ key. - `true`: Enabled - `false`: Not enabled

AllAuthority.description: Default permissions for the RocketMQ key. - `ALL`: Publish and subscribe permissions - `PUB`: Publish permission - `SUB`: Subscribe permission - `DENY`: No publish or subscribe permissions

CreateTime.description: Creation time for the RocketMQ key. Time format: YYYY-MM-DD'T'HH:MM:SS'Z'

Description.description: Description for the RocketMQ key, used to distinguish and manage keys effectively. Length limit: 0–128 characters

SecretKey.description: RocketMQ key. Returned only after creation

TopicPermissions.description: Custom permissions for the key. Sets the permissions this AccessKey has for a specific Topic. If there are no custom permissions, displays as null
